category_sources: source_facts.description says neocmakelsp is a CMake LSP; official docs describe it as a CMake language server based on tree-sitter and tower.
display_name_sources: Official docs and repository use the lowercase project name neocmakelsp; source_facts.name is neocmakelsp.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official neocmakelsp site; official docs page is under /docs and links to installation, reference, and GitHub.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has official repository https://github.com/neocmakelsp/neocmakelsp, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CMake LSP; official docs mention CMake language server, tree-sitter, autocompletion, formatting, and definitions.
